label: electronvolt
source: SI Brochure 9th ed. (BIPM 2019), Tables 2 & 4; affine/scaled factors re-derived from the brochure, never copied from QUDT (documented QUDT factor errors: Keil & Schindler 2018)
notes: EXACT since SI 2019: 1 eV = e·(1 V) and e is a defining constant, so the scale is the exact decimal 1.602176634e-19 J — a non-coherent unit whose factor is nonetheless exact by fiat.
bridgeStatus: asserted-unverified: QUDT unit IRIs and UCUM codes asserted from documentation knowledge, not yet verified by dereference/UCUM-grammar check (follow-up bead)
